content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across sectors today — IT (+11%), pharma, FMCG, capital goods, defense, financial services all up materially. Most held positions are now in profit. US markets up sharply overnight (+1.5-2%) supportive. Priority is to TRAIL stops aggressively to lock in gains across the book given the strong unrealized P&L sitting on freshly-opened positions.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. SL at 1035 is already above entry (locked +5.2%). CMP is 1056.70, SL 1035 sits 2.0% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline (>=1% required). Holding SL/target unchanged; thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, RBI rate-cut tailwind). HOLD effectively — no MODIFY needed since values unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. SL 121 = -3.3% from CMP, target 135 = +8.8%. Macro hedge intact. No trail action warranted at slight loss; SL 121 is reasonable absorption budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4% unrealized. Current SL 1735 already above entry (+2.1% lock). Trail-gap: 1757.10 - 1735 = 22.10 = 1.26% — within 1% floor. No-op MODIFY (values unchanged) — emit HOLD instead. Correcting: keeping HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4520.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Original SL 4570 was 0.1% below entry — extremely tight, would trigger on any normal pullback. Loosening blocked by guardrail (SL can only tighten). Keeping at 4570. Per rules, MODIFY blocked. Emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. Trail-gap check: 7049 - 6960 = 89 = 1.26% gap, within tolerance. SL 6960 already above entry. Q4 EBITDA +80%, FY26 margin doubled. No-op vs stored — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",

      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. SL 815, gap = 0.9% — slightly below 1% floor but close. No-op vs stored. Emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",

      "product": "CNC",

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. SL 3000 = 1.1% below CMP. Defense rally, Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1. Hold; SL appropriate at this stage."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. SL 798 = 1.2% below CMP. Q4 record revenue, MF AUM +21%. Hold."
    }
  ],

  "watchlist_notes": "Pending HFCL MIS LIMIT 133.50 BUY from 1913m ago (~yesterday) is stale — should be cancelled if still open via order management; not actioning here since no fresh thesis. LUPIN, BIOCON earnings today — avoiding new entries (binary event rule, holdings <3 sessions away). VEDL/AUROPHARMA — already extended on the day, no chase. Sufficient diversified exposure already; book is full of fresh positions that need time to work.",
  "portfolio_notes": "11 fresh CNC positions opened; deployed capital effectively close to soft target. Sector spread: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS) ~3 names — watch cluster cap; Capital Goods (HAL, TITAGARH, GRSE) ~3 names — defense/PSU cluster, also monitor; Pharma/Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), FMCG (MARICO), IT (COFORGE), Services (ADANIPORTS), ETF (GOLDBEES). Cluster discipline: no new Financial Services or Capital Goods adds today. Priority for next tick: monitor positions, trail SLs as gains develop beyond +2%/+4% thresholds, exit losers crisply. No new entries warranted — book is fully populated with diversified high-quality setups."
}
